mapper.select: SELECT team_id,team_name,t.stadium_id,emblem,s.name,s.address,s.capacity,s.latitude,s.longitude,s.image,s.near_station_name,s.near_station_lat,s.near_station_lng FROM KLeague_Team t JOIN KLeague_Stadium s ON t.stadium_id=s.stadium_id WHERE team_id=#{team_id}
SELECT team_id,team_name,emblem,s.name FROM KLeague_team t JOIN KLeague_Stadium s ON t.stadium_id=s.stadium_id ORDER BY team_id ASC

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY SUM(u.win_count) DESC) AS rank, t.team_id, t.team_name, t.emblem, SUM(u.win_count) AS wins FROM ( SELECT home_team_id AS team_id, home_win AS win_count FROM kleague_schedule WHERE game_date>=TO_DATE('20260101','YYYYMMDD')
UNION ALL
SELECT away_team_id AS team_id, away_win AS win_count FROM kleague_schedule WHERE game_date>=TO_DATE('20260101','YYYYMMDD') ) u JOIN kleague_team t ON u.team_id = t.team_id GROUP BY t.team_name, t.team_id, t.emblem ORDER BY rank ASC
